item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -R...
item.description:
Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Pide 🇹🇷🧀 INGREDIENTS For the Dough -50/50 All-purpose f...
item.description:
Pide 🇹🇷🧀 INGREDIENTS For the Dough -50/50 All-purpose flour and bread flour -Warm water -Active dry yeast or instant yeast -Sugar -Sea salt -Olive oil For the glaze (optional) -Egg yolk -Plain yogurt -Olive oil For the Ground Lamb Topping (Kıymalı) -Ground lamb -Onion -Green pepper -Red pepper -Tomatoes -Tomato paste (I forgot to film this…) -Parsley -Paprika -Cumin -Aleppo pepper, Urfa pepper, or chili flakes -Salt -Black pepper -Cheese for topping: Kaşar peyniri, beyaz peynir (substitute: mozzarella and feta) Enjoy!
#cooking #turkishfood
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Butter Chicken with 🇮🇳 Ingredients For the garam masala:...
item.description:
Butter Chicken with 🇮🇳 Ingredients For the garam masala: -Green cardamom pods -Black cardamom pods -Cinnamon sticks -Cloves -Black peppercorns -Coriander seeds -Cumin seeds -Fennel seeds -Mace blades -Bay leaf -Star anise -Rose petals -Poppy seeds For the marinade: -Boneless skinless chicken thighs -Thick plain yogurt -Lemon juice -Ginger -Garlic -Kashmiri red chili powder (or deggi mirch) -Ground coriander -Turmeric -Garam masala -Oil -Salt For the butter chicken sauce: Cinnamon stick and cardamom to infuse ghee Ghee Ginger Garlic Tomatoes (passata, crushed, or fresh) Kashmiri red chili powder (or deggi mirch) Ground cumin Ground coriander Garam masala (from the blend below) Dried fenugreek Heavy cream Salt Butter For the naan: -Atta or AP Flour -Yeast -Sugar -Warm milk -Yogurt -Egg
@Cooking_with_kian #cooking #butterchicken
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: French Onion Soup 🧅 Ingredients For the homemade beef stock ...
item.description:
French Onion Soup 🧅 Ingredients For the homemade beef stock Beef bones (such as marrow and knuckle), can also use meaty shank, short rib Tomato paste (spread all over in last 10 minutes of roasting) Yellow onions Carrots Celery Garlic Bay leaves Black peppercorns Thyme Cold water For the soup and gratiné Yellow onions or combination Unsalted butter Extra virgin olive oil Salt Pinch of sugar All-purpose flour (optional) Dry white wine, vermouth, or cognac Roasted beef stock (homemade or the best store bought you can get!) Thyme Bay leaf Black pepper Baguette (Optional: I toasted it in butter and chopped parsley) Gruyère or Comté cheese Enjoy!
#frenchonionsoup #fallrecipes #comfortfood #dinner
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Cappellacci Di Zucca🇮🇹 INGREDIENTS For the filling -Butter...
item.description:
Cappellacci Di Zucca🇮🇹 INGREDIENTS For the filling -Butternut squash -Garlic -Salt -Black Pepper -Extra virgin olive oil -Thyme -Sage -Mascarpone -Parmigiano reggiano -Nutmeg For the pasta -00” Flour -Whole eggs For the sauce: -Butter, lots of it -Sage -Prosciutto (optional, crisped up in pan)
#cooking #pasta #butternutsquash #fallrecipes

item.title: Arroz Con Pollo using Ranchera Sauce and Pasta de Tomate. Pick...
item.description:
Arroz Con Pollo using Ranchera Sauce and Pasta de Tomate. Pick up Naturas at your local Hispanic retailer or follow my Amazon link in bio, and submit your recipes using the !  Un paquete. Mil posibilidades. Ingredients:  Naturas Ranchera Sauce Naturas Pasta de Tomate Chicken thighs and/or breast White jasmine rice Broth or water White or yellow onion Red bell pepper Garlic Frozen peas, carrots, and corn Cilantro Salt Black pepper Cumin Lime
@Natura’s Sauces USA #1000RecetasChallenge #NaturasPartner #NaturasUSA #1000RecetasChallenge

item.title: Shepherd’s pie🇬🇧 Ingredients For the lamb filling: -Car...
item.description:
Shepherd’s pie🇬🇧 Ingredients For the lamb filling: -Carrots -Onion -Celery -Garlic -Peas (fresh or frozen) -Ground lamb -Salt -Black pepper -Tomato paste -Bay leaf -Rosemary -Thyme -Red wine -Lamb or beef stock -Worcestershire sauce -AP Flour (optional to thicken) For the potato topping: -Russet or Maris Piper potatoes -Butter -Milk and/or cream -Salt -White pepper -Egg yolk -White Cheddar Cheese (freshly grated)
#shepherdspie #uk #comfortfood
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: STEAK FRITES WITH GREEN PEPPERCORN SAUCE 🥩 INGREDIENTS Fo...
item.description:
STEAK FRITES WITH GREEN PEPPERCORN SAUCE 🥩 INGREDIENTS  For the Steak -New York strip steaks -Salt -Freshly cracked black pepper -Neutral oil (I used avocado) -Unsalted butter -Rosemary -Thyme -Sage For the Frites -Russet potatoes -Neutral frying oil  -Flakey salt -Parsley -Parmigiano Reggiano For the Green Peppercorn Sauce -Unsalted butter -Shallots -Green peppercorns in brine -Cognac -Heavy cream -Dijon mustard -Kosher salt
#steakfrites #aupoivre #steak #dinner #fall
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Tortilla Española 🇪🇸 INGREDIENTS For the Tortilla -500 g ...
item.description:
Tortilla Española 🇪🇸 INGREDIENTS For the Tortilla -500 g Yukon Gold potatoes -1 or 2 large onions depending on your love of onion (onions are optional but my preference) -6 whole eggs + 3 yolks -Extra virgin olive oil -Salt For the Chorizo topping -Cured or semi-cured Spanish chorizo -1 tbsp tomato paste -1 garlic clove -1 tsp sherry vinegar -1 tbsp olive oil For the Aioli -2 egg yolks -3/4 - 1 cup neutral oil (I use avocado oil) -2 garlic cloves, mashed into a paste -2 tsp lemon juice -½ tsp smoked paprika (optional) -Pinch of salt
#cooking #tortilla #española #eggs #huevos

item.title: CHICKEN MARSALA Ingredients -For the chicken: -2 chicken breast...
item.description:
CHICKEN MARSALA Ingredients -For the chicken: -2 chicken breasts -½ cup all-purpose flour -1 tsp salt -½ tsp black pepper (few good cracks of pepper all over) -Garlic -2-3 tbsp olive oil -2 tbsp unsalted butter For the sauce: -Mushrooms of choice (ie: Cremini, white button) -Shallot -Garlic -Dry Marsala wine -Chicken broth -Heavy cream -A few sprigs of fresh thyme -Rosemary -Bay leaf -Salt -Black pepper -Knob of butter -Parsley
#dinner #pasta #chickenmarsala
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
